subcodes.first_line: Rejoice, O My loved ones, in that which the Most Exalted Pen doth make mention of you, in spite of those who have disbelieved in God, the Lord of all mankind [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان افرحوا یا احبائی بما یذکرکم القلم الاعلی رغما للذین کفروا بالله مولی الوری
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God and human limitations, @thankfulness; gratitude, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment
